styleHead: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation
castCountLine: CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.
actionText: INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. The Old Man A single dim ray, like the thread of a spider, shoots from the lantern and falls full upon the vulture eye. It is open-wide, wide open. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "It was open — wide, wide open — and I grew furious as I gazed upon it." Camera directive: Extreme close-up on the open vulture eye, single spider-thread lantern ray slicing across the dull blue iris. Performance: Acting intensity 7/10: Widening furious eyes locked on the eye, nostrils flaring, jaw clenched Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, crushed charcoal shadows, cold blue-black tones, single sickly amber lantern ray Character_The_Old_Man <IMAGE_1> is on screen.
prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Also present (not shot focus); keep identity consistent: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin,....
- Character_The_Old_Man <IMAGE_1> [The Old Man]: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair, deeply lined pale face; one pale blue eye with a dull filmy veil, the other eye ordinary; wears a plain white period nightshirt. Visual lock: Always elderly, white-haired, frail; signature constant is the single pale blue eye with dull filmy veil that must not drift to clear blue or to the Narrator's face; nightshirt is his default on-screen garment. Voice: Elderly male; thin, reedy, low energy; short startled phrases; weak breath support; same fragile voice in the single spoken line and any murmur. Match appearance of reference <IMAGE_1> exactly.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok off-camera voiceover. Character_The_Narrator narrates exactly: "It was open — wide, wide open — and I grew furious as I gazed upon it.". Start speaking immediately with "It" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Do not lip-sync on-screen cast to this VO. Secondary layer = soft room tone / Foley. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

Follow the camera framing and location in this prompt exactly. Prioritize the PRIMARY subject and ONE clear action with visible motion; background characters may stay mostly still.

THIS CLIP:
End cleanly when the spoken line and primary action finish — do not hold a frozen pose or empty silence after dialogue.
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. The Old Man A single dim ray, like the thread of a spider, shoots from the lantern and falls full upon the vulture eye. It is open-wide, wide open. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "It was open — wide, wide open — and I grew furious as I gazed upon it." Camera directive: Extreme close-up on the open vulture eye, single spider-thread lantern ray slicing across the dull blue iris. Performance: Acting intensity 7/10: Widening furious eyes locked on the eye, nostrils flaring, jaw clenched Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, crushed charcoal shadows, cold blue-black tones, single sickly amber lantern ray Character_The_Old_Man <IMAGE_1> is on screen. / 480p, 24fps

NEGATIVE: no legible text, no watermarks, no logos, no extra limbs, blur/obscure environmental signage or screens, no name tags, no name badges, no embroidered names, no lower thirds, no personal names on clothing or props, no modern wristwatches, no electric light bulbs, no plastic, no zippers, no denim, no sneakers, no smartphones, no power outlets, no fluorescent lights, no synthetic fabrics, no LED lamps, no modern electronics, no printed logos, no vinyl records, no asphalt.
